title: To The Author Of 'Hesperides
content:
Hayrick some do spell thy name,
And thy verse approves the same;
For 'tis like fresh-scented hay,
With country lasses in't at play.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Allingham delivers a powerful performance in "To The Author Of 'Hesperides"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
